name: CXJ GROUP CO., Ltd
summary: PART I Regulatory Overview Legal and Operation Risks CXJ Group Co., Limited (ECXJ, us, the Company or we) is a United States holding company primarily operating in China through its PRC WFOE subsidiary CXJ (Shenzhen) Technology Co., Ltd. (SZ CXJ).
